utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 top-level items. Now check completeness: 1) destination: specified (OK). 2) travel_dates: specified (OK). 3) transportation: flight details with costs—carrier, flight number, airports, cost provided (OK). 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs—name, nights, cost provided (OK). 5) activities: only listed as names without individual costs; the format requires activities with costs, so not fully specified (NOT OK). 6) additional_services: includes items with costs (OK). 7) total_budget: single total given but not a detailed breakdown summing components; the format requests a complete cost breakdown; since individual activity costs are missing, the breakdown is incomplete (NOT OK). Therefore, 5 out of 7 items are fully specified.
